_question: Can the State Bar of California hold public meetings that require attendees to sign in?
_note: Score distribution across all 43 sections. Score range 0-5. Unlike the USC Title 1 example (where only 2 of 8 sections scored > 0), this 43-section document produces a broader relevance spread — expected for a question about a document whose entire purpose is open-meeting rules.
